parsed.production_notes: The video combines a direct screen recording of an app interface with live-action footage of human hands interacting with a smartphone.

characters.appearance: Two hands with a dark complexion holding a smartphone. Only the hands and lower arms are visible.
characters.demeanor: Actively tapping and swiping on the phone screen.

scenes.setting: Digital app interface, white background, yellow wheel.

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital spinning wheel with various segments. Some segments contain green rectangular objects resembling bills. The wheel is yellow with a red pointer at the bottom. The background is plain white.

scenes.visual_description: A digital spinning wheel game is shown. The wheel spins and lands on a segment. A notification pops up at the top of the screen. Text overlays are present at the bottom.

scenes.setting: Dark, blurry background, holding a smartphone.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two hands hold a smartphone against a dark, blurry background. The phone screen displays a chat interface with message bubbles. A finger from the right hand taps on one of the message bubbles, causing a small pop-up menu to appear. The finger then taps an option within the menu, and a new message bubble appears below the original one.

scenes.visual_description: Hands hold a smartphone showing a WhatsApp chat with a bank. A credit alert message is visible. The user taps the message, selects an option, and a Hindi translation of the message appears.

scenes.setting: Dark, blurry background, holding a smartphone.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two hands hold a smartphone against a dark, blurry background. The phone screen displays a home screen with several app icons. A finger from the right hand taps on one of the icons, and the screen transitions to an app store page. The finger then taps a prominent button on the app store page.

scenes.visual_description: The user navigates to the phone's home screen, taps the Google Play Store icon, and opens the page for the Zinglish app. They then tap the Open button.
